data.title: IDenta Corp Reports 2025 Financial Results, Achieves Continued Profitability and Strengthens Balance Sheet for Global Expansion
data.description: A company based in Hollywood, Florida, IDenta Corp. (OTCQB: IDTA), known for its quick field detection and forensic identification solutions, recently revealed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The report showcased sustained profitability and enhanced financial performance.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield Recognized by Newsweek as One of America’s Greatest Workplaces for Women
data.description: In New York, Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK), a top real estate services firm, has been honored by Newsweek as one of America’s Greatest Workplaces for Women 2026, achieving a perfect five-star rating. Newsweek, in collaboration with Plant-A Insights Group, bestowed this annual recognition after conducting a survey of over 89,000 female employees. The assessment considered 120 important performance metrics to identify the leading workplaces for women in the country.

data.title: Patriots QB Drake Maye, Wife Ann Michael and 800+ Granite Teammates Raise $4.155 Million for Boston Children's Hospital
data.description: Granite Telecommunications in Quincy, Mass., held its 'Saving by Shaving' event, raising an impressive $62.7 million for health care since 2014. As a prominent provider of communication and technology solutions in North America, Granite has made a significant impact through this initiative.

data.title: Xojo 2026r1 Delivers Enhanced Debugging, Simplified macOS Signing Experience, More Controls for Windows, Web, and Android
data.description: In a recent update from Xojo, Inc. in Austin, Texas on March 31, 2026, it was announced that Xojo 2026 Release is now available. This release includes new enhancements such as watchpoints, signing improvements, and enhanced controls for a more robust user experience. Xojo is known for its powerful cross-platform development tool and programming language, catering to developers across different operating systems. This update is set to offer users more advanced capabilities and smoother functionalities.

data.title: Leading Crunch Fitness Franchisee Opens Its 94th Location, Bringing State-of-the-Art Fitness to Pompano Beach
data.description: In Pompano Beach, Florida, on March 31, 2026, a leading Crunch Fitness Franchisee, CR Fitness, has revealed the launch of their latest facility at 1401 S Federal Hwy, Pompano Beach, FL 33062. This inauguration signifies Crunch's 94th branch and introduces a cutting-edge fitness experience to the area.

data.title: Inc. Names Payzli to Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Companies in the Southeast
data.description: In the recent Inc. Regionals list, Payzli has secured the impressive position of #96, standing out as one of the rapidly expanding private companies in the Southeast region. The announcement was made on March 31, 2026, in Tampa, Florida. Inc., a prominent media entity providing valuable insights and guidance for entrepreneurs and industry influencers, disclosed this ranking, highlighting Payzli's growth and success in the region.

data.title: DealerFire Helps Dealerships Turn Social Media Engagement into Website Traffic with Proven Strategies
data.description: A company named DealerFire based in WESTLAKE, Texas, stated on March 31, 2026, the significance of social media for automotive dealerships. DealerFire specializes in automotive dealership websites and digital marketing solutions. They are assisting dealerships in leveraging the power of social media to maximize their reach and engagement with potential customers.

data.title: NewBeauty Reveals Its 2026 Beauty Award Winners
data.description: NewBeauty, a leading authority in beauty, health, and wellness, revealed the recipients of its 16th Annual Beauty Awards on March 31, 2026. The event took place in Cranbury, New Jersey. This prestigious recognition highlighted the industry's most groundbreaking products and treatments.

data.title: Norris McLaughlin, P.A. Partners with The Chrysalis Project to Support Young Women's Success in Underserved Communities
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Bridgewater, NJ, the law firm Norris McLaughlin, P.A. revealed a new partnership with The Chrysalis Project. This project, established in 2017 by a retired accountant and ex-Assistant of Plainfield Municipal Utilities Authority, aims to support the community. The collaboration is set to enhance the project's impact by offering legal support.

data.title: BTC traders anticipate dip to $60K despite price near $68K, yet charts hint at surge towards $82K.
data.description: Market analysts are predicting that Bitcoin's price consolidation will likely shift towards $60,000. However, based on technical charts, there is a strong possibility of a surge towards $82,000 in a liquidation rally.

data.title: Latitude Promotes Anne McKnight to Vice President of Talent
data.description: McKnight has been appointed to lead the global legal talent strategy for Latitude, a prominent flexible legal staffing company based in Nashville, Tennessee. This decision comes as the company experiences ongoing growth in its operations. Latitude offers services to law firms and corporate legal departments, connecting them with former in-house and Big Law attorneys on a global scale. The announcement was made on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Why Are Strategy Shares Seesawing On Tuesday?
data.description: Shares of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) experienced fluctuations, initially declining then rebounding during Tuesday's trading session. Currently, MSTR stock is showing volatility, coinciding with Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) exhibiting stability. Bitcoin is trading at $67,508.08, showcasing a 0.19% increase over the last 24 hours with a total market capitalization of around $1.35 trillion as per CoinMarketCap data. Notably, investor Martin Shkreli criticized Strategy's Executive Chairman Michael Saylor, demanding his arrest following a promotional video for the company's preferred stock. Curious for further details? Visit Benzinga.com for more on this story.
